mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description, r.resource_type AS resourceType, r.category, r.points_cost AS pointsCost, r.status, r.owner_id AS ownerId, u.nick_name AS ownerName, u.public_key AS ownerAddress, r.image_url AS imageUrl, r.borrow_count AS borrowCount, r.create_time AS createTime FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.owner_id = u.id WHERE r.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.public_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.borrow_count DESC, r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description, r.resource_type AS resourceType, r.category, r.points_cost AS pointsCost, r.status, r.owner_id AS ownerId, u.nick_name AS ownerName, u.public_key AS ownerAddress, r.image_url AS imageUrl, r.borrow_count AS borrowCount, r.create_time AS createTime FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.owner_id = u.id WHERE r.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.public_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.borrow_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description, r.resource_type AS resourceType, r.category, r.points_cost AS pointsCost, r.status, r.owner_id AS ownerId, u.nick_name AS ownerName, u.public_key AS ownerAddress, r.image_url AS imageUrl, r.borrow_count AS borrowCount, r.create_time AS createTime FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.owner_id = u.id WHERE r.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.public_key IS NOT NULL AND (r.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY r.borrow_count DESC
SELECT r.*, u.nick_name AS ownerName, u.public_key AS ownerAddress FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.owner_id = u.id WHERE r.borrower_id = #{borrowerId} AND r.status IN ('PENDING', 'LENT')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource (name, description, resource_type, category, points_cost, status, owner_id, owner_address, borrow_count, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{resourceType}, #{category}, #{pointsCost}, 'AVAILABLE', #{ownerId}, #{ownerAddress}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET status = #{status}, borrower_id = #{borrowerId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resource SET borrow_count = borrow_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resource WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET status = #{status}, borrower_id = #{borrowerId}, borrow_end_time = #{borrowEndTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description, r.resource_type AS resourceType, r.category, r.points_cost AS pointsCost, r.status, r.owner_id AS ownerId, u.nick_name AS ownerName, u.public_key AS ownerAddress, r.image_url AS imageUrl, r.borrow_count AS borrowCount, r.create_time AS createTime FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.owner_id = u.id WHERE r.status != 'OFFLINE' ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
